nasb.text: When they set out from Rephidim, they came to the wilderness of Sinai and camped in the wilderness; and there Israel camped in front of the mountain.

esv.text: They set out from Rephidim and came into the wilderness of Sinai, and they encamped in the wilderness. There Israel encamped before the mountain,

cnv.text: 他們從利非訂起行，來到西奈的曠野，就在曠野安營；以色列人在那座山前安了營。

ccb.text: 他们离开利非订，来到西奈旷野，在那里的山下安营。
